device_name: Stethee Pro 1, Stethee Pro Software System
intended_use: The Stethee™ Pro 1 is an electronic stethoscope intended for screening and medical diagnostic purposes only. It may be used for the detection and amplification of sounds from the heart, lungs, arterie
intended_use_full: The Stethee™ Pro 1 is an electronic stethoscope intended for screening and medical diagnostic purposes only. It may be used for the detection and amplification of sounds from the heart, lungs, arteries, veins, and other internal organs with or without the use of selective frequencies. It can be used on any person undergoing a physical assessment. Stethee Pro 1 is intended for use with the Stethee Pro Software System, whose features enable recording, playback, visualization, analysis, management and reporting of patient samples, and sharing this data with other authorized users.
target_condition: Cardiac and pulmonary abnormalities requiring auscultation
ground_truth: Reference devices: 3M Littmann Model 3200 Electronic Stethoscope and Capnostream 35 Portable Respiratory Monitor
other_metrics: Heart rate detection range: 30-200 BPM with allowable readout error rate of no greater than ±10% (10% consistency) of the input rate or ±5 bpm, whichever is less. Respiration rate range: 6-50 breaths per minute ±1 breath per min.
